title: Hydra Medium 4.0 Preparation
author: Rob Steele
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z4jf8un

steps.title: Fill Nalgene tank with 100 liters...
steps.instruction: Fill Nalgene tank with 100 liters of high purity water (Nanopure, MilliQ, or equivalent). The volume markings on the side of the tank are accurate enough for determining how much water you have added.

steps.title: Add sodium bicarbonate 4
steps.instruction: Add sodium bicarbonate 4.2 g Mix well with plastic paddle

steps.title: Add potassium chloride 0
steps.instruction: Add potassium chloride 0.22 g Mix well with plastic paddle

steps.title: Add anhydrous magnesium sulfate 3
steps.instruction: Add anhydrous magnesium sulfate 3.97 g Mix well with plastic paddle

steps.title: Add calcium chloride dihydrate 14
steps.instruction: Add calcium chloride dihydrate 14.7 g Mix well with plastic paddle
